flashcards.back: Needs are high-level stakeholder objectives, requirements are detailed technical specifications derived from those needs.
Software Requirements Specification - formal document describing system requirements
Poor requirements management according to industry studies
Validation: Checking right requirements. Verification: Checking requirements implemented correctly.
Track requirements from origin through implementation and testing
System shall allow users to reset passwords via email verification
Brainstorming sessions, organizational charts, or interviews
Must have, Should have, Could have, Won't have
Clarify vague requirements through interactive models
System should be fast (missing measurable metrics)
